g.text: Short Write Handling — Partial Send Recovery
return; // Real error, not short write
sqe->user_data = req->user_data; // Same ID for tracking

text.tspan: // Note: buffer still owned until complete!
// Note: buffer still owned until complete!

div.p: cqe->res < len is NOT an error Short writes are NORMAL in async I/O. The kernel accepts what fits in the send buffer. Always check bytes_sent < total_len and resubmit. Never reuse buffer until bytes_sent == total_len
Send buffer has only 600 bytes free Slow receiver → TCP window closed Kernel accepts what fits
